title: Salla Zend
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Salla_Zend.jpg]] |name=Salla Zend |homeworld=[[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Orange |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Do you want to lose your fingers or what, Solo?"
"Sorry, Salla, I... I just can't help it."
"Well, keep your hands off my instruments. Nobody flies the ''Starlight Intruder'' but me.|Salla Zend and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|audio=Salla.flac|[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]}} '''Salla Zend''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the ex-girlfriend of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. She and cohort [[Shug Ninx]] later helped Solo and his wife [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senator]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] save [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and foil the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] plan to control the galaxy from [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] with her remarkably fast ship, the ''[[Starlight Intruder]]'' (which Zend often claimed was faster than the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], but in a number of races with the Falcon, the Intruder never came out on top). ==Biography== [[File:StalightIntruder.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Salla's ''[[Starlight Intruder]]''.]] Zend was originally a student with a true gift for fixing and modifying machinery, yet she didn't seek training to become an [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] or a [[Technician/Legends|technician]], preferring to become a [[Starship/Legends|spaceship]] mechanic aboard a corporate vessel. Eventually, she saved up enough money for a loan, with which she bought her own ship. Her first time on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] was eventful, with her getting into a fight with a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named "[[Jump]]," who tried to romance her at first, but then tried to be rough; his roughness only got him a dislocated shoulder. Tweaking out her vessel, the [[Rimrunner (Gymsnor-4)|''Rimrunner'']], Zend began repaying the debt by smuggling with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' She was one of the many smugglers who fought in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] where she and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] were partnered up. During the battle, she personally destroyed three [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruisers]] with her ship's [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. A race with Solo past a [[Neutron star/Legends|neutron star]] almost ended in disaster when her [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] failed and Solo nearly died rescuing her. Disturbed by the narrow miss, Zend wished to marry Solo, but he refused and said goodbye to her.''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' She later partnered up with [[Shug Ninx]].''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' {{Char-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== Salla Zend and the ''Starlight Intruder'' first appeared in the third issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' series, [[Dark Empire 3|''The Battle for Calamari'']]. Vocal actress [[Glynnis Talken Campbell|Glynnis Talken]] played Salla in the [[1994]] [[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]. In [[1995]], Talken acted out Salla again in the [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]. Although the first edition of ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' would firmly establish Salla's [[Species/Legends|species]] as Human, she does have a "purr" and slight [[Alien/Legends|alien]] reverb to her voice in these audio adaptations. ==Appearances== [[File:SallaZend-DEHandbook.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Salla with Shug Ninx]] *''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' *[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse
